## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Teero and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, upcoming plans, and personal updates.](https://fathom.video/share/eSi-rWqNFCgAPL8zuabc5heK7GrBTv1s?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content focusing on hygienist-specific life events (e.g., new mothers, childcare) performs well due to the 95% female demographic](https://fathom.video/share/eSi-rWqNFCgAPL8zuabc5heK7GrBTv1s?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Nate will be on vacation next week; meeting in two weeks will include designer for conversion analysis](https://fathom.video/share/eSi-rWqNFCgAPL8zuabc5heK7GrBTv1s?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [Shifting focus to more staffing-related content for variety](https://fathom.video/share/eSi-rWqNFCgAPL8zuabc5heK7GrBTv1s?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Portugal discussed as a favorite family vacation destination](https://fathom.video/share/eSi-rWqNFCgAPL8zuabc5heK7GrBTv1s?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy for Hygienists

  - [High-performing topics:](https://fathom.video/share/eSi-rWqNFCgAPL8zuabc5heK7GrBTv1s?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)
      - [Retired/traveling hygienists](https://fathom.video/share/eSi-rWqNFCgAPL8zuabc5heK7GrBTv1s?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
      - [Recently graduated hygienists seeking jobs](https://fathom.video/share/eSi-rWqNFCgAPL8zuabc5heK7GrBTv1s?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
      - [Temp work as a way to try different offices](https://fathom.video/share/eSi-rWqNFCgAPL8zuabc5heK7GrBTv1s?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
      - [Childcare and returning to work after having a child](https://fathom.video/share/eSi-rWqNFCgAPL8zuabc5heK7GrBTv1s?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)
      - [Accommodating nursing mothers (e.g., lactation breaks)](https://fathom.video/share/eSi-rWqNFCgAPL8zuabc5heK7GrBTv1s?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Avoid: Layoff-related content (high job security in the field)](https://fathom.video/share/eSi-rWqNFCgAPL8zuabc5heK7GrBTv1s?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [Niche targeting strategy working well:](https://fathom.video/share/eSi-rWqNFCgAPL8zuabc5heK7GrBTv1s?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
      - [Actual traffic exceeding keyword estimates](https://fathom.video/share/eSi-rWqNFCgAPL8zuabc5heK7GrBTv1s?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
      - [Low competition allowing for content dominance](https://fathom.video/share/eSi-rWqNFCgAPL8zuabc5heK7GrBTv1s?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)

### Content Performance and Planning

  - [Articles performing well overall](https://fathom.video/share/eSi-rWqNFCgAPL8zuabc5heK7GrBTv1s?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Shifting focus to include more staffing-related content](https://fathom.video/share/eSi-rWqNFCgAPL8zuabc5heK7GrBTv1s?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Keyword research to be conducted to confirm topic viability](https://fathom.video/share/eSi-rWqNFCgAPL8zuabc5heK7GrBTv1s?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
